requirement_topic.en: Cybersecurity — ARCOTEL / SNAP Advisory Guidelines for IoT and Connected Devices
requirement_topic.zh: 网络安全 — ARCOTEL / SNAP 物联网及联网设备顾问指引
requirement_topic.zht: 網路安全 — ARCOTEL / SNAP 物聯網及聯網裝置顧問指引

summary.en: Ecuador does not yet have a mandatory IoT device cybersecurity certification scheme equivalent to the US Cyber Trust Mark or the EU Cyber Resilience Act. ARCOTEL and SNAP (Secretaría Nacional de la Administración Pública) have issued cybersecurity guidelines and policy frameworks for connected devices and information systems. As of 2026, cybersecurity requirements for consumer IoT wireless devices in Ecuador remain advisory rather than mandatory pre-market certification conditions, but compliance with ARCOTEL technical guidelines on device security is expected during the homologación process and may become mandatory in future regulatory updates.
summary.zh: 厄瓜多尔目前尚无与美国Cyber Trust Mark或欧盟《网络弹性法》等效的物联网设备网络安全强制认证体系。ARCOTEL和SNAP（国家公共行政秘书处）已为联网设备和信息系统发布网络安全指引和政策框架。截至2026年，厄瓜多尔消费类物联网无线设备的网络安全要求仍为顾问性而非强制性的上市前认证条件，但在型式认证过程中预期须遵循ARCOTEL设备安全技术指引，且未来监管更新时可能成为强制要求。
summary.zht: 厄瓜多爾目前尚無與美國Cyber Trust Mark或歐盟《網路韌性法》等效的物聯網設備網路安全強制認證體系。ARCOTEL和SNAP（國家公共行政秘書處）已為聯網裝置和資訊系統發佈網路安全指引和政策框架。截至2026年，厄瓜多爾消費類物聯網無線裝置的網路安全要求仍為顧問性而非強制性的上市前認證條件，但在型式認證過程中預期須遵循ARCOTEL裝置安全技術指引，且未來監管更新時可能成為強制要求。

standards_or_laws: ARCOTEL cybersecurity technical guidelines for telecom equipment and services
SNAP — Esquema Gubernamental de Seguridad de la Información (EGSI, Ecuador national information security framework, based on ISO/IEC 27001)
Ley Orgánica de Telecomunicaciones 2015 — general security obligations
CAN (Andean Community) — Decision 587 and related digital security frameworks (advisory)

summary.en: China has a mandatory Multi-Level Protection Scheme (MLPS / 等保 Děng Bǎo) for network operators and information systems, and MIIT has issued IoT security guidelines. For exported devices, no Chinese government certification specifically addresses the cybersecurity requirements of foreign markets; device-level security is typically addressed through manufacturer declarations or international standards (ISO/IEC 27001, IEC 62443) on a voluntary basis for export.
summary.zh: 中国对网络运营者和信息系统实施强制性等级保护（MLPS/等保）制度，MIIT亦已发布物联网安全指引。对于出口设备，没有专门针对境外市场网络安全要求的中国政府认证；设备层面的安全通常以制造商声明或国际标准（ISO/IEC 27001、IEC 62443）为依据，出口时为自愿性质。
summary.zht: 中國對網路運營者和資訊系統實施強制性等級保護（MLPS/等保）制度，MIIT亦已發佈物聯網安全指引。對於出口設備，沒有專門針對境外市場網路安全要求的中國政府認證；設備層面的安全通常以製造商聲明或國際標準（ISO/IEC 27001、IEC 62443）為依據，出口時為自願性質。

standards_or_laws: MLPS (Multi-Level Protection Scheme / 等保) — China domestic network operators
MIIT IoT security guidelines (advisory for exported devices)
GB/T 22239 (Information security technology — baseline for classified protection of cybersecurity)

gap.en: Advisory gap (likely to become mandatory): No mandatory IoT device cybersecurity pre-market certification exists in Ecuador as of 2026. ARCOTEL and SNAP guidelines apply on an advisory basis. Chinese exporters should document device security practices (password management, firmware update mechanisms, data encryption) as best practice and to support ARCOTEL homologación technical dossiers. Monitor ARCOTEL resolutions for any transition to mandatory cybersecurity certification requirements.
gap.zh: 顾问性差距（可能转为强制）：截至2026年，厄瓜多尔尚无针对物联网设备的强制性网络安全上市前认证。ARCOTEL和SNAP指引以顾问性方式适用。中国出口商应记录设备安全规范（密码管理、固件更新机制、数据加密），作为最佳实践并支持ARCOTEL型式认证技术档案。请持续关注ARCOTEL决议，以便及时了解是否转为强制性网络安全认证要求。
gap.zht: 顧問性差距（可能轉為強制）：截至2026年，厄瓜多爾尚無針對物聯網裝置的強制性網路安全上市前認證。ARCOTEL和SNAP指引以顧問性方式適用。中國出口商應記錄裝置安全規範（密碼管理、韌體更新機制、數據加密），作為最佳實踐並支持ARCOTEL型式認證技術檔案。請持續關注ARCOTEL決議，以便及時了解是否轉為強制性網路安全認證要求。

source.publisher: ARCOTEL — Agencia de Regulación y Control de las Telecomunicaciones / SNAP — Secretaría Nacional de la Administración Pública

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] As of 2026, Ecuador has no mandatory pre-market cybersecurity certification for consumer IoT wireless devices. ARCOTEL and SNAP guidelines apply on an advisory basis. Chinese exporters should document device security practices to support ARCOTEL homologación dossiers and to be prepared for potential future mandatory requirements. Verify current ARCOTEL cybersecurity resolutions with a qualified Ecuadorian regulatory professional before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 截至2026年，厄瓜多尔对消费类物联网无线设备尚无强制性上市前网络安全认证。ARCOTEL和SNAP指引以顾问性方式适用。中国出口商应记录设备安全规范，以支持ARCOTEL型式认证档案并为未来可能出现的强制性要求做好准备。发货前请与合格的厄瓜多尔监管专业人士核验现行ARCOTEL网络安全决议。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 截至2026年，厄瓜多爾對消費類物聯網無線裝置尚無強制性上市前網路安全認證。ARCOTEL和SNAP指引以顧問性方式適用。中國出口商應記錄裝置安全規範，以支持ARCOTEL型式認證檔案並為未來可能出現的強制性要求做好準備。發貨前請與合格的厄瓜多爾監管專業人士核驗現行ARCOTEL網路安全決議。
